messages.content: 用英语怎么说：我非常认同你的观点
I completely agree with your point of view.
重写上面句子
I strongly agree with your viewpoint.
用英语(UK)翻译以下句子：要是不能得到预期成果，这可能就是一种时间和精力的浪费
If the desired outcome cannot be achieved, it could be a waste of time and effort.

用英语翻译以下内容：我非常认同你的观点，Toon el at. (2009)的研究也表明线上学生会有孤立感，学生必须足够多才多艺才能与老师和其他同学联系，而学生和老师互动具有必要性。另外，Lee(2019）的研究表明，adult learners actually need a lot of support in terms of learning strategies and emotional support, and many online learners showed that they didnot know what and how to learn. These studies contradicts the Andragogy learning theory assumption ( (Knowles,1990) that adult learners are capable of guiding their own learning. 尽管Lee的（2019）研究只访谈了十名成功从开放大学毕业的学生，但是这似乎是普遍的观点。也和我的经历类似，对现在的学校系统和学习方法都很陌生，好在格拉斯哥大学充分考虑了这一点。而另外，Robert (2018) 指出线上学习缺乏学生服务的现状，对比于高等教育中公立学校和私立学校的20%和30%的经费预算, while virtual students’ online service support receives little attention and investment. 更糟糕的事，成人学习者可能面临着更多的挑战，例如，adult learners face multiple responsibilities and lack time (Lee, 2019; Cercone, 2008; Choi et al., 2013; Carnoy et al., 2012)。OECD（2020）的统计数据也表明了类似的观点，43% of individuals reported lack of time as the main barrier to participating in adult learning, with work and family responsibilities accounting for 28% and 15% respectively. This is also the primary reason for adult learners dropping out (Vergidis & Panagiotakopoulos, 2002; Carnoy et al., 2012).

I strongly agree with your viewpoint. Toon el at. (2009) research also indicates that online students may experience feelings of isolation, and students must possess diverse skills to engage with teachers and peers, making student-teacher interaction essential. Additionally, Lee's (2019) study shows that adult learners actually require significant support in terms of learning strategies and emotional assistance, as many online learners expressed uncertainty about what and how to learn. These studies contradict the assumption of the Andragogy learning theory (Knowles, 1990) that adult learners are capable of self-directed learning. Although Lee's (2019) study only interviewed ten successful graduates from an open university, this seems to be a widespread sentiment. It aligns with my own experience, as I find the current school system and learning methods unfamiliar. Fortunately, the University of Glasgow has taken this into consideration. On the other hand, Robert (2018) points out the lack of student services in online learning, in contrast to the 20% and 30% budget allocation for public and private schools in higher education, respectively. Virtual students' online service support receives little attention and investment. To make matters worse, adult learners may face even more challenges, such as multiple responsibilities and lack of time (Lee, 2019; Cercone, 2008; Choi et al., 2013; Carnoy et al., 2012). OECD (2020) statistical data also supports similar observations, as 43% of individuals reported a lack of time as the main barrier to participating in adult learning, with work and family responsibilities accounting for 28% and 15% respectively. This is also the primary reason for adult learners dropping out (Vergidis & Panagiotakopoulos, 2002; Carnoy et al., 2012).
用英语翻译以下句子：所以我非常支持Joo’s (2014) 的研究结论矛盾是复杂的和多方面的，来自于成人学习者自身生活，教育机构的提供的服务和 学生和机构互动的环境。

So, I strongly support the conclusion of Joo's (2014) research that contradictions are complex and multifaceted, arising from the lives of adult learners themselves, the services provided by educational institutions, and the environment of interaction between students and institutions.

According to OECD (2020) statistics, 43% of adults indicated a lack of time as the biggest barrier to participating in adult learning, with employment and family commitments accounting for 28% and 15%, respectively. 把这句话缩句到20个字
43% of adults lack time for learning (OECD, 2020).
用英语翻译以下句子：确实，尽管线上学习很方便，但是如前述这样，感觉到疏离，和老师同学互动又有困难，甚至缺乏学习技能等，遭受挫折和降低自我效能似乎就很容易理解了，自我效能指一个人多大程度相信自己有能力完成一件事情，自我效能感低会影响个人的努力和坚持水平（(Bandura, 1986)。

Indeed, despite the convenience of online learning, as mentioned earlier, feelings of detachment, difficulties in interacting with teachers and peers, and even a lack of learning skills can lead to frustration and diminished self-efficacy. It is easy to understand that low self-efficacy, which refers to the extent to which a person believes in their ability to accomplish a task, can affect individual effort and perseverance (Bandura, 1986).
用英语翻译以下句子：确实，尽管线上学习很方便，但是如前述这样，感觉到疏离，和老师同学互动又有困难，甚至缺乏学习技能等，这就很容易理解人们会遭受挫折和降低自我效能了。自我效能指一个人多大程度相信自己有能力完成一件事情，自我效能感低会影响个人的努力和坚持水平（(Bandura, 1986)。

Indeed, despite the convenience of online learning, as mentioned earlier, it is easy to understand why people may experience feelings of detachment, encounter difficulties in interacting with teachers and classmates, and even lack learning skills. This can lead to frustrations and a decrease in self-efficacy. Self-efficacy refers to the extent to which a person believes in their ability to accomplish a task, and low self-efficacy can greatly impact individual effort and perseverance (Bandura, 1986).
将下面的句子翻译成英语：你现在空吗，我们试着将我们的观点融合成对话？
Are you available now? Let's try to merge our viewpoints into a conversation.
将下面的句子翻译成英语：如果为了对话更流畅，你也可以编辑我的内容如果你需要的话，只要不改变我的evidence就可以了
If it helps for smoother conversation, you can also edit my content if needed, as long as it doesn't alter the evidence I provide.
将下面的句子翻译成英语：引出你的内容
Introduce your content.
用英语翻译以下句子：以及低收入人群本来拥有的资源更有限
Furthermore, individuals with low incomes already have limited resources.
用英语翻译以下句子：和拥有资源更少的低收入人群。
And low-income individuals with even fewer resources.
用英语翻译以下句子：具体来说，该理论假设成人是具有内在动机的人，能够在整个学习过程中保持动机并且指导他们的学习。
Specifically, the theory assumes that adults are intrinsically motivated individuals who can sustain motivation throughout the entire learning process and guide their own learning.

用英语翻译以下句子：幸运的是，虽然面临很多苦难，很多研究提出了建设性意见。OECU（2020）从政策制定层面提出了一系列系统性建议，包括：由国家层面建立在线学习的质量保证制度，以及发展数字技能和加强数字基础设施，避免互联网接入的不平等有可能加剧教育和培训方面现有的不平等。另外，Thongmak（2021）研究表明游戏化可以提高电子学习的效率。在个人层面有些研究对我来说非常帮助，相信也适用于具有多重职责和缺乏学习技能的学习者。

Fortunately, despite facing numerous challenges, several studies have proposed constructive suggestions. OECD (2020) presents a series of systemic recommendations at the policy-making level, including establishing quality assurance systems for online learning at the national level, developing digital skills, and strengthening digital infrastructure to avoid exacerbating existing inequalities in education and training resulting from unequal internet access. Additionally, research by Thongmak (2021) indicates that gamification can enhance the effectiveness of e-learning. On an individual level, some studies have been highly beneficial to me and are believed to be applicable to learners with multiple responsibilities and a lack of learning skills.

用英语翻译以下句子：Lee(2019) 研究显示通过在线学习的成人学习者都具有自我调节能力，which can be developed during the learning process and resist negative external factors once formed。尽管自我调节相关的理论和知识不少，但是对于缺乏时间的成年人和资源薄弱的低收入人群来说，自我调节技能可能是一个必要的技能，好在这只要付出时间和努力是能够学会的。

Lee's (2019) study demonstrates that adult learners who engage in online learning possess self-regulation abilities, which can be cultivated throughout the learning process and help them resist negative external influences once developed. Despite the existence of numerous theories and knowledge related to self-regulation, for time-constrained adults and low-income individuals with limited resources, self-regulation skills may be necessary. The good news is that these skills can be learned with time and effort.

翻译以下句子：However, Lee没有分析习惯的重要性，in his article, participants 多次提到习惯 and emphasized the need for a stable learning schedule that aligns with other important responsibilities and a stable environment (Lee, 2019).

However, Lee did not analyze the importance of habits in his article. Participants, on multiple occasions, mentioned the significance of habits and emphasized the need for a consistent learning schedule that accommodates other important responsibilities and a stable environment (Lee, 2019).

用英语翻译以下句子：Fiorella（2020）指出相对于做非习惯性行为，学生感觉到更低的压力并且可以想其他的事情在做习惯性动作时。因为习惯具有自动化，无意识和mental efficiency的特点（Verplanken，2006）。正如Henderikx et al. (2017) claimed that although many people desire to complete formal or informal online courses, they often fail另外有研究表明habits do not require the use of limited self-control resources (Englert et al., 2017), and self-control is a part of self-regulation (Duckworth et al., 2019). 除了学习自我调节的相关理论，成人学习者也应该重视养成习惯的技巧。

Fiorella (2020) points out that students feel less pressure and are able to focus on other things when engaging in habitual actions compared to non-habitual behaviors. This is because habits possess characteristics of automation, unconsciousness, and mental efficiency (Verplanken, 2006). As Henderikx et al. (2017) claimed, although many individuals desire to complete formal or informal online courses, they often fail to do so. Additionally, research has shown that habits do not require the use of limited self-control resources (Englert et al., 2017), and self-control is a component of self-regulation (Duckworth et al., 2019). Therefore, in addition to theories related to self-regulation in learning, adult learners should also prioritize the development of habits.
翻译以下句子：除了学习自我调节的相关理论，成人学习者也应该重视养成习惯的技巧。
In addition to studying theories related to self-regulation, adult learners should also pay attention to the development of habits and skills.
翻译以下句子：很高兴这次主题让我探寻了线上学习和成人学习者目前存在一些广泛的问题，最重要的是我学习一些有利于学习的理论知识，包括self-regulation and habits，对我非常有帮助，我现在感觉养成好习惯并不难如果利用环境和奖励等技巧。

I am glad that this topic allowed me to explore some common issues in online learning and adult learners. Most importantly, I have learned beneficial theoretical knowledge, including self-regulation and habits, which has been very helpful to me. I now feel that developing good habits is not difficult, especially when utilizing techniques such as creating a conducive environment and implementing rewards.
用英语翻译以下内容：这不禁让人质疑，是不是线上学习没有提供学生需要的互动条件或者教育服务质量，让成人学生不得不变得更独立和具自我导向才能完成学业。

This raises doubts about whether online learning fails to provide the necessary conditions for student interaction or the quality of educational services, forcing adult learners to become more independent and self-directed in order to complete their studies.
翻译以下句子：我质疑
I question.
I believe that it is important to consider how scaffolding is affected, 这句话是什么意思
This sentence means that the speaker believes it is crucial to examine how scaffolding is impacted or influenced by certain factors or circumstances.
用中文
我认为重要的是考虑脚手架（指导）是如何受到影响的。
